initial_candidates.sql:
WITH category_avg AS (
    SELECT 
        i_category,
        AVG(i_current_price) AS avg_price
    FROM item
    GROUP BY i_category
),
filtered_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        ca_state,
        c_customer_sk,
        i_category,
        i_current_price,
        ca_avg.avg_price
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN customer ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
    JOIN customer_address ON customer.c_current_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    JOIN item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    JOIN category_avg ca_avg ON item.i_category = ca_avg.i_category
    WHERE date_dim.d_year = 2001 
      AND date_dim.d_moy = 1
      AND item.i_current_price > 1.2 * ca_avg.avg_price
)
SELECT 
    ca_state,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM filtered_sales
GROUP BY ca_state
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 10
ORDER BY cnt ASC, ca_state ASC
LIMIT 100;
initial_candidates.exec_error: Binder Error: Ambiguous reference to column name "i_category" (use: "item.i_category" or "ca_avg.i_category")

WITH category_avg AS (
    SELECT 
        i_category,
        AVG(i_current_price) AS avg_price
    FROM item
    GROUP BY i_category
),
filtered_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        ca_state,
        c_customer_sk
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN customer ON ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
    JOIN customer_address ON c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    JOIN item ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
    JOIN category_avg ON i_category = category_avg.i_category
    WHERE d_year = 2001 
      AND d_moy = 1
      AND i_current_price > 1.2 * avg_price
)
SELECT 
    ca_state,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM filtered_sales
GROUP BY ca_state
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 10
ORDER BY cnt ASC, ca_state ASC
LIMIT 100

initial_candidates.sql:
WITH category_avg AS (
    SELECT 
        i_category,
        AVG(i_current_price) AS avg_price
    FROM item
    GROUP BY i_category
),
filtered_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        ca_state,
        c_customer_sk
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN customer ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
    JOIN customer_address ON customer.c_current_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    JOIN item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    JOIN category_avg ON item.i_category = category_avg.i_category
    WHERE date_dim.d_year = 2001 
      AND date_dim.d_moy = 1
      AND item.i_current_price > 1.2 * category_avg.avg_price
)
SELECT 
    ca_state,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM filtered_sales
GROUP BY ca_state
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 10
ORDER BY cnt ASC, ca_state ASC
LIMIT 100;

WITH category_avg AS (
    SELECT 
        i_category,
        AVG(i_current_price) AS avg_price
    FROM item
    GROUP BY i_category
),
filtered_items AS (
    SELECT 
        i_item_sk,
        i_category,
        i_current_price
    FROM item i
    JOIN category_avg ca ON i.i_category = ca.i_category
    WHERE i.i_current_price > 1.2 * ca.avg_price
),
filtered_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        ss.ss_customer_sk,
        ss.ss_item_sk,
        ca.ca_state
    FROM store_sales ss
    JOIN customer c ON ss.ss_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
    JOIN customer_address ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
    JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    JOIN filtered_items fi ON ss.ss_item_sk = fi.i_item_sk
    WHERE d.d_year = 2001 AND d.d_moy = 1
)
SELECT 
    ca_state,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM filtered_sales
GROUP BY ca_state
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 10
ORDER BY cnt ASC, ca_state ASC
LIMIT 100;
initial_candidates.exec_error: Binder Error: Ambiguous reference to column name "i_category" (use: "i.i_category" or "ca.i_category")
